prompt: A cinematic, high-contrast surrealist illustration in 2048x2048 resolution. The landscape is a clean, geometric park. On the left and right, small white-stone models of global icons sit in lush green grass. In the center, a massive India Gate made of dark, gritty dust erupts with a violent orange-yellow smog plume. Within the smog, abstract lung silhouettes are clearly visible. The ground at the center is cracked and grey. Tiny human figures wear respirators. High texture, no text, no currency.
metaphor: Tiny, healthy global monuments represent the well-represented majority classes, while the massive, corrupted India Gate is a high-magnitude outlier that dominates the data distribution.
